result.summary: Full L1 shutdown; no through service S-Penn to S-East.

citations.snippet: DSR-2026-001 L1 full shutdown; estimated_resume: unknown.
Line shutdown contingency: rider comms + alternate-mode guidance.

text: L1 is not running right now — full-line suspension under DSR-2026-001 (see INC-2001 and service.suspended log L-201001). The affected segment spans S-Penn through S-East via S-Jamaica, S-Hicksville, S-Mineola, S-Ronkonkoma, and S-Babylon. Estimated resume time is unknown. Refer to runbook RB-11-line-shutdown-contingency for the standard rider-comms playbook.
